title: Net Worth Tracker
metaDescription: Calculate your total net worth by listing assets and liabilities, instantly in your browser. Nothing you enter is saved or transmitted.
shortDescription: Add your assets and liabilities to calculate total net worth.

guideSections.heading: Why Net Worth Is a Snapshot, Not a Trend, Until You Repeat It
guideSections.body: A single net worth calculation tells you where things stand today but says nothing about direction. The number becomes genuinely useful once it's recalculated at consistent intervals — quarterly or annually — so the trend, not the absolute figure, becomes the thing worth paying attention to.

guideSections.heading: Why Illiquid Assets Need Honest Valuation, Not Optimistic Estimates
guideSections.body: Home equity, vehicle value, and other illiquid assets are easy to overstate, since their listed value isn't the same as what they'd actually sell for after transaction costs. A net worth figure built on inflated illiquid asset values can create a misleading sense of financial cushion that isn't really there if it needed to be accessed quickly.

guideSections.heading: Nothing You Enter Here Is Saved
guideSections.body: This tool runs entirely in your browser. Closing or refreshing this page clears everything you've entered — nothing is transmitted to or stored on any server.
